translationText: We sent it down on the Night of Decree.
But what will convey to you what the Night of Decree is?

arabicText: لَيْلَةُ ٱلْقَدْرِ خَيْرٌۭ مِّنْ أَلْفِ شَهْرٍۢ
translationText: The Night of Decree is better than a thousand months.

arabicText: تَنَزَّلُ ٱلْمَلَٰٓئِكَةُ وَٱلرُّوحُ فِيهَا بِإِذْنِ رَبِّهِم مِّن كُلِّ أَمْرٍۢ
translationText: In it descend the angels and the Spirit, by the leave of their Lord, with every command.
Peace it is; until the rise of dawn.
